history.description: "Top 5000Brittany Murphy (I) (1977–2009)Actress | Soundtrack | Producer Brittany Murphy was born Brittany Anne Bertolotti on November 10, 1977 in Atlanta, Georgia, to Sharon Kathleen Murphy and Angelo Joseph Bertolotti.
